title: Activies Export

posts.author: Pedroalvespereira (Pedro Henrique Alves Pereira)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to extract a report focusing solely on activities added to a deal, such as emails sent, calls made, meetings held, etc. This would allow me to understand, for example, the average number of calls needed to close a deal. Additionally, it would help identify cases where a salesperson made only one call for a deal, compared to another salesperson making 20 calls for a different deal.
